description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the default Docker image (no image specified) that runs a before_script installing Emacs via apt-get and printing its version, then defines a test job in the default test stage that executes "make". The before_script should contain "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq emacs" followed by "emacs --version". The test job runs the single command "make" and inherits the before_script. No caches, artifacts, services, variables, or special rules are required.
